keyring.name: keyring-content-test.invalid/keys/test.rsa.pub
keyring.content:
-----BEGIN PUBLIC KEY-----
Embedded keyring bytes for rules_apko e2e test. If this file exists in
the keyring repo without a network fetch, the content-consumption path
works; the URL host above is intentionally unreachable so a fallback
fetch would fail the test.
-----END PUBLIC KEY-----
